articles.title: Starmer says case of girls raped by boys spared custody 'appalling'
articles.description: The prime minister said it was "right" that the sentences were being urgently reviewed.

articles.title: Why did I put myself through the pain of going to court, rape victim tells BBC
articles.description: A girl who was raped by two teenage boys has told the BBC that a judge's decision to spare them jail sentences was like a "rock straight in my face".

articles.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
articles.description: The US president said both sides "must take their time" to reach a deal, after saying on Saturday that an agreement had been "largely negotiated".

articles.title: Heatwave conditions met in eight parts of England as record-breaking temperatures forecast
articles.description: The soaring temperatures could lead to new national May temperature records being set on bank holiday Monday.
